title: Refactor: Implement template method pattern
original_text: Refactored to implement template method pattern. Added abstract base class with template method. Implemented primitive operations for subclasses. Added hook methods for optional behavior. Implemented concrete classes with specific algorithms. Result: template method pattern implemented.
expected_body_lines: - Add abstract base class with template method
- Add hook methods for optional behavior
- Implement concrete classes with specific algorithms
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(pattern): implement template method pattern"
